title: In a board: Make it possible to define any view as main or standard view.
excerpt:
In a board: Make it possible to define any view as main or standard view. 
In our team different team members need different standard view or simply prefer to work in a calendar instead of a chart.

posts.author: mdd42 (Marcel Dykiert)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a board: Make it possible to define any view as main or standard view.
In our team different team members need different standard view or simply prefer to work in a calendar instead of a chart.
